id.description: A URI uniquely identifying this schema document (RFC 3986). A URN is RECOMMENDED.

OpenSchemaVersionString.description: The OpenSchema Specification version this document conforms to. MUST follow Semantic Versioning 2.0.0.

title.description: The title of the schema document.

version.description: The version of the schema document contents.

description.description: A short description. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

termsOfService.description: An absolute URL to the Terms of Service.

name.description: The identifying name of the contact person or organization.

url.description: An absolute URL pointing to the contact information.

email.description: The email address of the contact person or organization.

url.description: An absolute URL to the license.

SystemsObject.description: A map of named concrete systems where the schemas MAY be applied.

SystemObject.description: A concrete database platform or deployment target.

type.description: A broad storage classification such as 'relational', 'document', or 'key-value'.

description.description: A short description of the target system.

SchemasObject.description: A map of named logical schemas. At least one schema MUST be present.

SchemaObject.description: A named logical schema. Each key is a container name mapping to a Container Object.

ContainersObject.description: A map of named Container Objects used in nested container locations.

ContainerObject.description: A logical container of persisted records (table, collection, bucket, etc.).

summary.description: A short summary of the container.

primaryKey.description: An ordered list of field names forming the logical primary key. Each entry MUST be unique, MUST be present in every record, and MUST correspond to a field declared in the container's fields.

required.description: A list of required top-level field names.

IndexObject.description: A secondary index for a container.

fields.description: An ordered list of indexed field descriptors. More than one entry represents a compound index.

unique.description: Whether the index enforces uniqueness across the indexed field set.

where.description: An optional predicate or filter expression for partial indexes.

description.description: A short description of the index.

IndexFieldObject.description: One field position within an index.

name.description: The field name included in the index. MUST correspond to a field declared in the enclosing container's fields. A conformant validator MUST fail when this name does not match any declared field.

order.description: The index ordering. MUST be 'asc' or 'desc' when specified.

FieldsObject.description: A map of named Field Objects.

FieldObject.description: A single field definition within a record.

type.description: The field type. Primitive examples: 'string', 'number', 'boolean', 'date', 'datetime', 'bytes', 'json'. Structured examples: 'object', 'array'.

title.description: A human-friendly title for the field.

nullable.description: Whether the field may explicitly contain a null value. A required field with nullable: true MUST be present but MAY be null.

default.description: A default value. MUST be type-compatible with the declared 'type'.

enum.description: An enumeration of allowed values. Each value MUST be type-compatible with the declared 'type'.

format.description: An implementation hint for more specific typing. Examples: 'int32', 'int64', 'float', 'double', 'decimal', 'decimal128', 'uuid', 'email'.

fields.description: Child fields. MUST only be present when type is 'object'. When omitted on an object-type field, the embedded object structure is not further constrained (schemaless).

items.description: The item definition for repeated values. MUST only be present when type is 'array'. Arrays are homogeneous: a single item type applies to all elements.

containers.description: Child containers embedded within this field's value. Valid when the target system supports hierarchical storage.

TagsObject.description: An ordered list of Tag Objects for logical grouping and discovery.

TagObject.description: A tag for logical grouping and discovery.

description.description: A description of the target documentation.

url.description: An absolute URL for the target documentation.

ComponentsObject.description: Holds reusable definitions that MAY be referenced via $ref from elsewhere in the document.

schemas.description: Reusable schema fragments of the same Schema Object type as root-level schemas values. Intended for reuse via $ref. Distinct from the root-level 'schemas' field, which declares named logical schemas.

ReferenceObject.description: References another component within the document or in an external document via a URI.

$ref.description: A URI reference to the target component. Internal refs begin with '#'; external refs MUST be absolute URIs (RFC 3986).
